message:
Fix 6 bugs from plan review round 2

- Fix const reassignment crash in _restoreWindow (const -> let)
- Fix duplicate const frameRect in _onDropStamp (reuse existing)
- Add missing Clutter import to extension.js
- Fix wrong test assertion for windowsBelowRank (expected ['a'] not ['d'])
- Wire stamp drag initiation with drag threshold detection
  (press+move>8px starts drag, release without move activates)
- Add keybindings section to prefs UI (zoom in/out editors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
